en_title: 1666: Amsterdam Developer Admits Using AI Assets and Apologizes, Says They'll Now Be Replaced
cn_title: 开发者承认《1666: Amsterdam》使用AI资产并道歉
subtitle: 火速认错
opus_summary: 《1666: Amsterdam》开发商就序章AI资产致歉，承诺更换为手绘，正式版杜绝AI。该序章免费登陆Steam和Epic，评价褒贬不一。

paragraphs.en: The developer of 1666: Amsterdam has apologized for its use of AI assets in the game's playable prologue, which is available now on PC.
paragraphs.cn: 《1666: Amsterdam》的开发商已就其在游戏可玩序章中使用AI资产一事道歉，该序章现已在PC上推出。

paragraphs.en: In a statement posted to X/Twitter, the studio acknowledged "concerns" had been raised by those who had played the 30-minute experience and spotted in-game art that appeared AI-generated.
paragraphs.cn: 在一份发布于X的声明中，工作室承认那些体验了30分钟试玩内容的玩家提出了「担忧」，他们发现了游戏中看似AI生成的美术作品。

paragraphs.en: Panache Digital Games, which previously made ape survival game Ancestors: The Humankind Odyssey, announced 1666: Amsterdam last week during the Summer Games Fest livestream . It's a concept that Panache founder Patrice Désilets devised years ago following his acrimonious exit from Ubisoft, where he co-created Assassin's Creed.
paragraphs.cn: Panache Digital Games此前开发了猿猴生存游戏《祖先：人类史诗》，在上周的夏日游戏节直播中公布了《1666: Amsterdam》。这一概念是Panache创始人Patrice Désilets多年前在充满争议地离开育碧后构思的，他曾在育碧共同创造了《刺客信条》。

paragraphs.en: The statement admits that Panache's team of artists used AI to generate "early versions of assets," which will now be replaced for the game's full version. It's unclear if these were always set to be replaced, or are simply being changed due to backlash.
paragraphs.cn: 声明中承认，Panache的美术团队使用AI生成了「早期版本的资产」，这些资产现在将在游戏完整版中被替换。目前尚不清楚这些资产原本是否就计划替换，还是仅仅因遭到反对而更改。

paragraphs.en: "A number of people have raised questions or concerns to us about whether assets in our marketing and game use generative AI," Panache wrote. "We have a dedicated team of over a dozen talented and experienced artists. With them, we looked into the assets in question and found that there were indeed some early versions of assets that made their way into the the prologue. This includes some in-game portraits and external marketing assets.
paragraphs.cn: 「有几名玩家向我们提出问题或担忧，询问我们的市场营销和游戏中的资产是否使用了生成式AI，」Panache写道。「我们有一支由十几位才华横溢、经验丰富的艺术家组成的专门团队。与这些艺术家一起，我们检查了相关资产，发现确实有一些早期版本的资产流入了序章。这包括一些游戏内的肖像和外部营销资产。」

paragraphs.en: "We are actively reviewing the assets in question. Human made versions will be released in an update dropping soon. We own up to this oversight and apologize for any upset caused. Please be assured that the Early Access and full game will not include any assets generated by AI."
paragraphs.cn: 「我们正在积极审查相关资产。人工制作的版本将在即将发布的更新中推出。我们承认这一疏忽，并为造成的任何不快道歉。请放心，抢先体验和完整版游戏将不会包含任何AI生成的资产。」

paragraphs.en: The 1666: Amsterdam Prologue is available now for free via Epic Games Store and Steam, where it sits with a 'Mixed' user review rating. "They use gen AI in many places," reads one user review. "Pictures inside the game, assets and even the promo key art is generated. I'm de-wishlisting it and ignoring the company." Said another: "about AI, it's not hard to hire an artist to do concept art, or in-game assets. The game has cut corners and in its current state and I cannot recommend it."
paragraphs.cn: 《1666: Amsterdam》序章现可通过Epic Games Store和Steam免费获取，获得了「褒贬不一」的用户评价。一条用户评测写道：「他们在许多地方使用了生成式AI，游戏里的图片、资产甚至宣传主视觉图都是生成的。我将它从愿望单中移除，并忽略这家公司。」另一条评论说：「关于AI，聘请一位艺术家来做概念图或游戏内资产并不难。游戏偷工减料，在目前的状态下，我不推荐。」

paragraphs.en: Others have praised the prologue's atmosphere and Assassin's Creed 2-like vibes, while some have criticised its technical performance. Still, it is early days — with an early access release due at some point later this year, before plans for a full launch at a later date.
paragraphs.cn: 其他人则称赞序章的氛围和类似《刺客信条2》的感觉，同时也有人批评其技术表现。不过，现在还处于早期阶段——预计今年晚些时候将推出抢先体验，之后再计划全面发布。

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips是IGN的新闻编辑。您可以通过tom_phillips@ign.com联系Tom，或在Bluesky上找到他。
